user_query: What is John's number one goal in his basketball career?

node_data.text: John's number one goal is to win a championship in basketball and also wants to make a difference through charity work and inspiring others.

node_data.text: John is focusing on improving shooting and making a greater impact on the court. He is also working on building his brand and seeking more endorsements for life after basketball.
